name: Waialua Estate Coffee & Chocolate
tagline: Farm-to-cup coffee grown and roasted right here on the North Shore — this is the real Hawaii coffee experience.
mustOrder: Waialua single-origin drip — grown literally across the road
chocolate-covered coffee beans — made on-site from estate cacao
parking: Free lot at the old Waialua Sugar Mill complex
talkStory: Located in the historic old Waialua Sugar Mill, this operation grows coffee and cacao on former sugarcane fields right across the road. One of the few places on Oahu where coffee is grown, roasted, and served in the same ahupua’a (Hawaiian land division). They also grow cacao on-site, so the chocolate-covered coffee beans are a double-local specialty. Ask about the current harvest — the farmers at the counter love talking story about how elevation and rainfall affect the cup.
